overall_justification: The newspaper edition mentions the Caixa de Conversão only briefly, in the context of Dr. Albuquerque Lins's expected presence at its inauguration. This mention is purely factual and does not express any opinion on the merits or demerits of the Caixa or its proposed implementation. The rest of the edition focuses on other news items, primarily related to coffee markets, shipping, and local events.

supporting_evidence.quote: Depois de concluída a sua missão no Rio, é provável que o sr. dr. Albuquerque Lins permaneça mais alguns dias naquella capital para assistir á inauguração da Caixa de Conversão.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This is the only mention of the Caixa de Conversão in the entire edition and it is purely factual.
